plugins.name: tasks-export
plugins.description: Distills a session into prioritized tasks and saves them as JSON to ~/tasks/<repo>/

plugins.name: implement-task
plugins.description: Implements a GitHub issue end-to-end: reads the issue, creates a branch, writes code, commits, and opens a PR.

plugins.name: pr-fix
plugins.description: Applies fixes requested via a PR review submission or a top-level PR comment.
